description: Cost-of-living per city — Numbeo + Expatistan snapshots cached in fire_planner.col_snapshot (1-year TTL). Powers the FIRE simulator's auto-COL adjustment. Use the city dropdown to drill into one city; the bottom panels rank all cities.

list.name: city
list.label: City
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT city_slug AS __value, city_display AS __text FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot ORDER BY city_display

list.name: baseline_city
list.label: Baseline city (for ratio)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT city_slug AS __value, city_display AS __text FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot ORDER BY city_display

panels.title: $city — Total monthly cost (with rent, single person)

targets.rawSql: SELECT total_with_rent_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT total_no_rent_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT rent_1bed_center_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: COL ratio vs $baseline_city
panels.description: Multiplier the simulator applies to spending_gbp when moving from $baseline_city to $city. 0.5x = half-the-price; 1.0x = same; 2.0x = double.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (c.total_with_rent_gbp / b.total_with_rent_gbp)::numeric(8,3) AS ratio FROM (SELECT total_with_rent_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1) c, (SELECT total_with_rent_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$baseline_city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1) b

panels.title: $city — Snapshot metadata
panels.description: Provenance for the current city. Snapshot date is when the source page was crawled; expires_at is when the cache row will be re-scraped (1-year TTL).

targets.rawSql: SELECT city_display, country, source_name, source_url, snapshot_date, fetched_at, expires_at, raw_currency, gbp_per_unit FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: $city — Cost breakdown (single person, monthly)
panels.description: Categories from baseline.py (Phase 1) — 0 for cities where the live scraper hasn't populated per-category yet. Rent and headline totals are always populated.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'rent_center' AS category, rent_1bed_center_gbp AS amount_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'rent_outside', rent_1bed_outside_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' AND rent_1bed_outside_gbp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'all_other', total_no_rent_gbp FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: All cities — ranked by Total monthly (with rent)
panels.description: Sortable table of every city in the cache. Click a column header to sort. Lower = cheaper.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (city_slug) city_slug, city_display, country, total_no_rent_gbp, total_with_rent_gbp, rent_1bed_center_gbp, source_name, source_url, snapshot_date, fetched_at FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot ORDER BY city_slug, fetched_at DESC), baseline AS (SELECT total_with_rent_gbp AS b FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot WHERE city_slug = '$baseline_city' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT l.city_display, l.country, l.total_with_rent_gbp, l.total_no_rent_gbp, l.rent_1bed_center_gbp, (l.total_with_rent_gbp / b.b)::numeric(8,3) AS ratio_vs_baseline, l.source_name, l.snapshot_date, l.source_url FROM latest l CROSS JOIN baseline b ORDER BY l.total_with_rent_gbp ASC

panels.title: Cache freshness — fetched_at across all cities
panels.description: When each city was last refreshed. Rows turning red are within 30 days of expiry (1-year TTL) — the refresh CronJob should pick them up before they go stale.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (city_slug) city_display, country, source_name, snapshot_date, fetched_at, expires_at, EXTRACT(DAY FROM expires_at - NOW())::int AS expires_in_days FROM fire_planner.col_snapshot ORDER BY city_slug, fetched_at DESC

title: Cost of Living
